LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE AND WAS LATER HEARD AT 2:45 IN THE AFTERNOON. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. DEFENDANT CHEMOIL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO WHETHER OR NOT THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION WAS BASED ON THE EVIDENCE THAT CAN BE FOUND IN THE PLAINTIFF'S ADDITIONAL MATERIAL DISPUTED & UNDISPUTED FACTS. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION HAVING TO DO WITH THE LIMITED $300,000 DAMAGES IS NOT PROPERLY BEFORE THE COURT. THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION HAVING TO DO WITH ROBINS DRY DOCK IS NOT COMPLETELY CLEAR WHETHER THIS IS A 437 C(S) BECAUSE THE NOTICE IS NOT CLEAR AS TO THE ISSUE BEING SOUGHT TO BE ADJUDICATED WHICH ACCORDING TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL GOES TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION OF TORT AND HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN. EVIDENTIARY ISSUES REGARDING THE ADMISSIBILITY OF SETTLEMENT NEGOTIATIONS IS OVERRULED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Defendant Chemoil Corporation'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ISMAEL BAUTISTA JR. & ATTY. MALCOM S. MCNEIL OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. (310) 598-4171 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MARISA G. HUBER OF GIBSON ROBB & LINDH LLP, TEL. NO. 979-2344 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS CALLED TWICE AND WAS LATER HEARD AT 2:45 IN THE AFTERNOON. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. Defendant Chemoil Corporation'S Motion For Summary Judgment OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT AS TO WHETHER OR NOT THE STATUTE OF LIMITATION WAS BASED ON THE EVIDENCE THAT CAN BE FOUND IN THE PLAINTIFF'S ADDITIONAL MATERIAL DISPUTED & UNDISPUTED FACTS. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION HAVING TO DO WITH THE LIMITED $300,000 DAMAGES IS NOT PROPERLY BEFORE THE COURT. THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION HAVING TO DO WITH ROBINS DRY DOCK IS NOT COMPLETELY CLEAR WHETHER THIS IS A 437 C(S) BECAUSE THE NOTICE IS NOT CLEAR AS TO THE ISSUE BEING SOUGHT TO BE ADJUDICATED WHICH ACCORDING TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL GOES TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION OF TORT AND HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN. EVIDENTIARY ISSUES REGARDING THE ADMISSIBILITY OF SETTLEMENT NEGOTIATIONS IS OVERRULED. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G) AND CRC 3.1312) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ISAMEL BAUTISTA JR. OF FOX ROTHSCHILD LLP, TEL. NO. (310) 598-4150 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MAISA G. HUBER OF GIBSON ROBB & LINDH LLP, TEL. NO. 979-2344 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.
